description: Try-catch-finally resource handling. processFile properly closes fd in finally block. leakyProcess leaks fd when throw occurs before closeSync.

expected.notes: fd leaks when throw fires at line 22 before closeSync at line 24; scanner may not track fd lifecycle in JS
noise: state-resource-leak on fs.openSync in processFile; the fd IS properly closed in the finally block at line 13, so this is a false positive
noise: state-resource-leak-possible on fs.openSync in processFile; the fd IS properly closed in the finally block at line 13, so this is a false positive
